steps.title: The catalog
steps.narration: This is GrekAI Skills for All, a free and open catalog of agent skills you can drop straight into Claude Code.

steps.title: Filter by category
steps.narration: Filter by category to find what you need. Everything here is a ready to use, self contained skill.

steps.title: The Tutorial skill
steps.narration: Here is the Tutorial skill. It records narrated walkthroughs of your own app, exactly like the one you are watching now.

steps.title: Skill details
steps.narration: Open any skill for its own page: what it does, when to use it, and the full README.

steps.title: One-line install
steps.narration: Copy the one line install, and the skill lands in your Claude skills folder. Free to use, and open for your contributions.
